zh.lifeSummary: 當William Peverell於大約1560年出生在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特 聖 馬丁時，他的父親John de Peverell31歲，母親Isabella Jane Trenchard26歲。他於1598年與Isabella Blanche Basset在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在英國多瑟特，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When William Peverell was born about 1560, in Exeter St Martin, Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Peverell, was 31 and his mother, Isabella Jane Trenchard, was 26. He married Isabella Blanche Basset in 1598, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Dorset, England, and was buried in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Isabella Blanche Basset en 1598, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Dorset, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Exeter St Martin, Exeter, Devon, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 마틴
ko.lifeSummary: William Peverell(이)가 대략 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 마틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Peverell(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Jane Trenchard(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1598년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Isabella Blanche Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 도르세트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에 묻혔다.

ru.Exeter St Martin, Exeter, Devon, England: эксетир ст мартинь, эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Peverell родился около 1560 г. в местности эксетир ст мартинь, эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Peverell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella Jane Trenchard, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Blanche Basset в 1598 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности дорсет, Англия и был похоронен в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
